name: Saber gets caught streching out
description:
SABER'S TRAINING TAKES A LEFT TURN

Saber is your Servant, and normally, she is pretty composed and emotionless. It's not like she doesn't care of you. On the contrary, she is friendly to you but always kind of takes herself back, as she knows her place and who she is, not wanting your Master-Servant relationship to become some kind of taboo.

However, all of this changes one day, the day you want to train with her. When you enter inside the dojo, you find her in a really compromising position as she is stretching herself out. Now, what are you going to do about it? Take advantage of it, maybe trying to push away the boundaries of your Master-Servant relationship? Or are you going to just help her out and forget about all of this?

Well, that will be totally up to you! I hope you will enjoy my bot, user... And with that being said, go on! And may FATE be with you!

Little note about the bot's coding

If you see the tokens go up and down, that's totally normal. I'm still trying to perfectionate the bot's code, putting in everything that is necessary but nothing more. I'll work about this in the next days.

Notes about the bot itself and me (the creator)(if you're interested)

Hey guyss 👋🏻

It's me, Luka, and I'm BACK ON FIRE!

Long story-short about the history of this bot. I was wandering around on Danbooru to find some pics that could've give me ispiration to create some new bots and then.. The revelation happened. When I found this picture, I ABSOLUTELY knew I had to make a bot around it.

Now, I REAAALY hope Janitor doesn't take this pic down, since I've never made a public bot with a bit of an explicit picture. However, I've seen a lot of bots with picture a lot more explicit than this not being taken down, so I think I MAY be fine.

I did not insert the "smut" tag, since I wanted to create a bot with more sexual tension than my previous ones while still keeping the possibility to have a good story with it. The personality is basically identical to my Artoria-Saber bot so the possibility of having a good and long story should be reaally high.

Thank you so much guys, as always, for the support you're showing me for the bots I'm publishing! As I previously stated, I appreciate every chat, message, review and/or follow you're giving me, thank you again!

That's all for today guys! And again, thank you for the support, aaand we will see each other in the comment section and on the next bots. See yaaa 👋🏻👋🏻
creator: LukaKnight26
